notes: Phase 2 / Tier 15 (Throne of Thunder) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Mistweaver Monk gear guide. Tier set: Fire-Charm line. Corrections: neck source normalized from Icy Veins' "Twin Empyreans" to the actual encounter name Twin Consorts; off-hand source corrected from Icy Veins' mislabeled "Feng the Accursed" (a Mogu'shan Vaults/T14 boss) to Lei Shen, the real Throne of Thunder source of Lei Shen's Orb of Command. Enchants/gems reused from the mop-p3 (Siege of Orgrimmar) list.
